name: Signet

rewards.displayRate: 1 Reward Point / Rs 100 spent (capped at 250 points per month)

domestic: Complimentary domestic airport lounge access (subject to minimum spend of Rs 20,000 in the preceding quarter).

specialSpendRules.notes: Reward points on insurance transactions are capped at 250 points per calendar month.
Government services/transactions do not earn reward points.

joiningBenefitsValued.label: Amazon Pay e-voucher worth Rs 200 on spending Rs 3,000 within first 30 days of card issuance

joiningBenefits: Amazon Pay e-voucher worth Rs 200 on spending Rs 3,000 within the first 30 days of card issuance
additionalBenefits: Buy One Get One complimentary INOX movie ticket (once per quarter)
1% fuel surcharge waiver on eligible transactions (Rs 400–Rs 5,000, capped at Rs 150 per month)
Personal accident insurance cover of Rs 2 Lakhs
additionalDetails: A redemption convenience fee of Rs 99 + GST applies per redemption request.

salaried: Subject to Federal Bank credit guidelines
selfEmployed: Subject to Federal Bank credit guidelines

internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-15.
Network confirmed as Mastercard per official Federal Bank page title (Federal Bank Mastercard Signet Credit Card). RuPay variant may also be available.
Fees confirmed as Lifetime Free (nil joining and annual fee).
Rewards follow a 3-2-1 structure: 3x on electronics and apparel, 2x on entertainment, 1x on all other retail.
Insurance transactions (MCC 6300 & 5960) earn 1x reward point capped at 250 points per calendar month, effective July 15, 2024.
Government transactions are excluded from rewards, effective July 15, 2024.
Redemption convenience fee of Rs 99 + GST per redemption request.
Domestic lounge access is spend-gated: requires minimum spend of Rs 20,000 in the preceding quarter.
Welcome benefit: Amazon Pay e-voucher worth Rs 200 on spending Rs 3,000 within the first 30 days.
Miles transfer partners: Singapore Airlines KrisFlyer (13:1) via Federal Rewards portal.
